subject: Completion of Gen AI Project
content:
Here is a formal email:

Subject: Completion of Gen AI Project

Dear Saunshi Sir,

I am pleased to inform you that I have successfully completed the Gen AI project as per the requirements. The project has been thoroughly tested and validated, and I am confident that it meets all the necessary standards. If you require any further information or would like to schedule a meeting to discuss the project, please let me know.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
